situation: GitHub Actions ran Loop runtime tests after CI was added.
symptom: Remote Loop runtime job failed while local tests passed.
cause: Tests used a local absolute path `/Users/jason/Documents/Codex/2026-06-13-new-chat`, which does not exist on GitHub runners.
impact: Remote CI could not enforce Loop runtime checks until tests became portable.
action_taken: Replaced hardcoded repository paths in tests with `Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]`.
next_step: Keep tests path-portable and add regression expectation for CI portability.

situation: Tried to enable GitHub branch protection on private repository.
symptom: GitHub API returned 403 and refused branch protection.
cause: Private repository branch protection was not available on the current GitHub plan.
impact: Required checks and PR review could not be platform-enforced while repo was private under that plan.
action_taken: Changed repository visibility to public, then applied `.github/branch-protection-main.json` successfully.
next_step: Keep branch protection enabled; future governance changes must go through PR and review.
related_check: Loop runtime tests, Tea finance build and tests
